programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein
programme.desc: (MA) Epstein utilises legal resources and elite connections to secure a 2008 plea deal. He maintains a high-society network, including royalty, despite his sex offender status.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein
programme.desc: (MA) Federal agents arrest Epstein for sex trafficking in 2019. Weeks later, he is found dead in his cell. The official suicide ruling faces public scrutiny and forensic debate.

programme.title: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: (M) A missing California teenager leaves her town anxious. As locals grow suspicious, her friends question if the threat was always nearby among classmates harboring dark secrets.

programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
